articles.title: Jack Dorsey’s 4,000 Job Cuts at Block Arouse Suspicions of AI-Washing - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: When Block Inc. laid off nearly half its staff this week, co-founder Jack Dorsey offered a seemingly simple explanation: artificial intelligence was allowing the company to do more with fewer employees.
